news.title:
Tata Steel invests ₹1,680.3 cr in T Steel Holdings; TVS Motor approves ₹12/share interim dividend.
HDFC Life faces ₹126.5 cr tax demand; NTPC Green signs MoU with Nxtra; Waaree plans ₹3,900 cr expansion.
news.summary:
Tata Steel invests ₹1,680.3 cr in T Steel Holdings; TVS Motor approves ₹12/share interim dividend.
HDFC Life faces ₹126.5 cr tax demand; NTPC Green signs MoU with Nxtra; Waaree plans ₹3,900 cr expansion.

news.title:
HDFC Life faces ₹126.46 cr tax demand plus ₹45.55 cr interest.
The company plans to challenge the order, citing no financial impact.
news.summary:
HDFC Life faces ₹126.46 cr tax demand plus ₹45.55 cr interest.
The company plans to challenge the order, citing no financial impact.

news.title: Morgan Stanley keeps Overweight rating on HDFC Life, revises target price to 840 from 875.
news.summary: Morgan Stanley keeps Overweight rating on HDFC Life, revises target price to 840 from 875.

news.title:
HDFC Life announces participation in Morgan Stanley Virtual India Financials Seminar on March 19, 2026.
Investor presentation for the event is hosted on HDFC Life's website; schedule subject to change.
news.summary:
HDFC Life announces participation in Morgan Stanley Virtual India Financials Seminar on March 19, 2026.
Investor presentation for the event is hosted on HDFC Life's website; schedule subject to change.

news.title:
HDFC Life faces GST tax demand of Rs 104.8 crore plus Rs 94.3 crore interest.
Deputy Commissioner upheld the demand; appeal planned, no financial impact expected.
news.summary:
HDFC Life faces GST tax demand of Rs 104.8 crore plus Rs 94.3 crore interest.
Deputy Commissioner upheld the demand; appeal planned, no financial impact expected.

news.title:
GIFT Nifty signals a weak start; Nifty futures down 0.5% at 25,592.5. Sensex gained 479.95 points, closing at 83,294.66.
Top Nifty gainers: Adani Ports, Dr. Reddy's, Kotak Mahindra. IT sector fell 1.4%, PSU Bank index rose 1.3%; volatility persists.
news.summary:
GIFT Nifty signals a weak start; Nifty futures down 0.5% at 25,592.5. Sensex gained 479.95 points, closing at 83,294.66.
Top Nifty gainers: Adani Ports, Dr. Reddy's, Kotak Mahindra. IT sector fell 1.4%, PSU Bank index rose 1.3%; volatility persists.

news.title:
RBI's stricter norms on bundling insurance with loans may impact high-margin credit protect sales, pressuring VNB margins for insurers.
HDFC Life and ICICI Prudential face higher exposure risks, while SBI Life and Max Life are relatively insulated; banks may see modest fee income impact.
news.summary:
RBI's stricter norms on bundling insurance with loans may impact high-margin credit protect sales, pressuring VNB margins for insurers.
HDFC Life and ICICI Prudential face higher exposure risks, while SBI Life and Max Life are relatively insulated; banks may see modest fee income impact.

news.title:
Life insurers reported increased demand for ULIPs in Q3FY26 due to strong equity market performance.
ICICI Prudential, HDFC Life, and LIC likely benefited from this trend in the October-December FY26 period.
news.summary:
Life insurers reported increased demand for ULIPs in Q3FY26 due to strong equity market performance.
ICICI Prudential, HDFC Life, and LIC likely benefited from this trend in the October-December FY26 period.

news.title:
HDFC Life plans investor/analyst meets at multiple conferences in February 2026.
Events include Axis Capital, Nuvama, Kotak Securities, and IIFL conferences in Mumbai.
news.summary:
HDFC Life plans investor/analyst meets at multiple conferences in February 2026.

news.title:
HDFC Life plans investor/analyst interactions on Jan 30, 2026, during PL Capital Financial Tour in Mumbai.
Investor presentation is available on HDFC Life's website; schedule is subject to changes due to exigencies.
news.summary:

news.title:
HDFC Life shows 11% growth in individual WRP; retail protection grew 42%.
Profit after tax rose 7% to ₹1,414cr; solvency ratio remains strong at 180%.
news.summary:
HDFC Life shows 11% growth in individual WRP; retail protection grew 42%.
Profit after tax rose 7% to ₹1,414cr; solvency ratio remains strong at 180%.

news.title:
New Labour Codes of Nov 2025 increased employee costs for private banks, insurers.
Higher operating expenses reported in Q3FY26 due to statutory impact of these codes.
news.summary:
New Labour Codes of Nov 2025 increased employee costs for private banks, insurers.
Higher operating expenses reported in Q3FY26 due to statutory impact of these codes.

news.title:
HDFC Life to participate in Goldman Sachs 2026 Asia Financials Corporate Day on Jan 21, 2026.
The company will also join HSBC Global Insurance Conference on Jan 27, 2026, with details on its website.
news.summary:

news.title:
HDFC Life executed an NSE block trade of 2,405,939 shares at Rs. 732.5.
The total trade value amounted to Rs. 176.2 crores.
news.summary:

The update was shared during the company's recent earnings call.

news.title:
HDFC Life Insurance targets agency channel growth exceeding overall company growth.
The company aims for over 25% contribution to its market share through this channel.
news.summary:
HDFC Life Insurance targets agency channel growth exceeding overall company growth.

news.title:
HDFC Life expects to offset GST effects in upcoming quarters.
The company aims to start FY27 with margins aligned to FY25 levels.
news.summary:
HDFC Life expects to offset GST effects in upcoming quarters.
The company aims to start FY27 with margins aligned to FY25 levels.

news.title:
HDFC Life expects Q4 growth driven by strong protection and savings demand.
The company aims to double VNB every 4-4.5 years despite rule changes.
news.summary:

The company aims to double VNB every 4-4.5 years despite rule changes.

news.title:
HDFC Life Q3 net profit rises 1.4% YoY to ₹420.7 crore.
Profit impacted by ₹98 crore due to new labour code implementation.
news.summary:
